1.title: backup.cohesity.alerts_dedup_count.gauge
1.query:
timeseries alerts_dedup_count = avg(backup.cohesity.alerts_dedup_count)
| sort arrayAvg(alerts_dedup_count) desc
| limit 20

2.title: backup.cohesity.alerts_open_count.gauge
2.query:
